steps.title: Use Butler's later success
steps.content: The passage says science fiction was dominated by white male authors, but Butler broke into the field and later won a MacArthur Fellowship. The blank must name a barrier she did not see as impossible to get through.

steps.title: Reject nonbarrier meanings
steps.content: A would mean legitimate, but the passage is not about whether the genre was valid. C would mean compelling, which does not fit the contrast. D means impossible to understand, not difficult to enter. The answer is B.
